item.title: New Aspekt Touch & Folio displays bring touch-first computing to Macs
item.description: Alogic is bringing more touch and stylus input options to Mac with a new desktop monitor and portable displays, expanding a lineup that adds a feature Apple doesn't offer on its own hardware yet.
item.content:encoded:
Alogic is bringing more touch and stylus input options to Mac with a new desktop monitor and portable displays, expanding a lineup that adds a feature Apple doesn't offer on its own hardware yet.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Amazon's AirPods 4 sale slashes price to $99, with delivery by Father's Day
item.description: Amazon's $99 AirPods deal makes a great gift for Dad, as delivery by Father's Day is still available to many locations.
item.content:encoded:
Amazon's $99 AirPods deal makes a great gift for Dad, as delivery by Father's Day is still available to many locations.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Siri AI leaves older Apple Watches behind without a clear reason
item.description: Apple's latest explanation for Siri AI on Apple Watch identifies which models support the feature, but it still doesn't explain why older watches are excluded despite requiring a nearby Apple Intelligence-enabled iPhone.
item.content:encoded:
Apple's latest explanation for Siri AI on Apple Watch identifies which models support the feature, but it still doesn't explain why older watches are excluded despite requiring a nearby Apple Intelligence-enabled iPhone.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Siri AI, Snap Spectacles, and iPhone rumors on the AppleInsider Podcast
item.content:encoded: Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: iPhone factory right back in the spotlight as India opens new contamination probe
item.description: After a conflict between guards and farmers nearly ended in violence, Tata's Indian iPhone factory is now facing health authority accusations of contamination.
item.content:encoded:
After a conflict between guards and farmers nearly ended in violence, Tata's Indian iPhone factory is now facing health authority accusations of contamination.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: iPadOS 27 beta review: Your iPad, now with Siri AI
item.description: Siri AI and system optimizations are the focus of iPadOS 27, but that's enough for iPad's usual in-between year. Power users will notice the changes the most.
item.content:encoded:
Siri AI and system optimizations are the focus of iPadOS 27, but that's enough for iPad's usual in-between year. Power users will notice the changes the most.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: What Siri AI, Apple TV, & more are like with CarPlay in iOS 27
item.content:encoded: Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Top 20 most streamed artists on Apple Music revealed
item.description: It should come as no surprise that Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, Ariana Grande, and Kendrick Lamar are among the top 20 most streamed artists of all time on Apple Music. Check out the full list.
item.content:encoded:
It should come as no surprise that Taylor Swift, Bad Bunny, Ariana Grande, and Kendrick Lamar are among the top 20 most streamed artists of all time on Apple Music. Check out the full list.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: A12 & A13 Apple devices face an unpatchable SecureROM vulnerability
item.description: Security researchers have published a new unpatchable SecureROM exploit for Apple's A12 and A13 chips, extending public BootROM exploitation beyond the devices affected by checkm8.
item.content:encoded:
Security researchers have published a new unpatchable SecureROM exploit for Apple's A12 and A13 chips, extending public BootROM exploitation beyond the devices affected by checkm8.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Apple's 1TB M5 MacBook Pro dips to $1,529 with B&H coupon
item.description: B&H's bonus coupon drives the price of Apple's 1TB MacBook Pro with an M5 chip down to $1,529.
item.content:encoded:
B&H's bonus coupon drives the price of Apple's 1TB MacBook Pro with an M5 chip down to $1,529.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix will be free on Apple TV in the US
item.description: Apple TV will stream an entire Formula 1 race weekend free to U.S. viewers for the first time, opening every Austrian Grand Prix session to fans without a subscription.
item.content:encoded:
Apple TV will stream an entire Formula 1 race weekend free to U.S. viewers for the first time, opening every Austrian Grand Prix session to fans without a subscription.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: EU-style App Store rules reach Brazil with new app stores & payments
item.description: Apple is bringing alternative app marketplaces and payment options to iPhone users in Brazil under an agreement with the country's antitrust regulator, extending App Store changes that were previously limited to the European Union.
item.content:encoded:
Apple is bringing alternative app marketplaces and payment options to iPhone users in Brazil under an agreement with the country's antitrust regulator, extending App Store changes that were previously limited to the European Union.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Woody Harrelson and Matthew McConaughey team up in Apple TV's new comedy series "Brothers"
item.description: A decades-old family secret threatens to unravel a lifelong friendship in "Brothers," set to premiere on Apple TV in September.
item.content:encoded:
A decades-old family secret threatens to unravel a lifelong friendship in "Brothers," set to premiere on Apple TV in September.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Pressure mounts for Apple to give unionized workers better options as Towson store closes
item.description: The Mayor of Baltimore has added his voice to the many telling Apple it needs to reconsider either closing the Towson store or at least giving its employees better opportunities in the region.
item.content:encoded:
The Mayor of Baltimore has added his voice to the many telling Apple it needs to reconsider either closing the Towson store or at least giving its employees better opportunities in the region.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Apple's AI agents in Xcode 27 make vibe coding easier
item.description: Making an app with Xcode may soon become easier than ever with AI, as an Apple presentation highlights the different use cases and capabilities of agentic coding.
item.content:encoded:
Making an app with Xcode may soon become easier than ever with AI, as an Apple presentation highlights the different use cases and capabilities of agentic coding.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: iPhone Air successor with two cameras rumored for spring 2027
item.description: A new rumor suggests that the iPhone Air 2 is being tested and is expected to launch in early 2027 with improved battery life and an ultra-wide camera. Though, these aren't groundbreaking claims.
item.content:encoded:
A new rumor suggests that the iPhone Air 2 is being tested and is expected to launch in early 2027 with improved battery life and an ultra-wide camera. Though, these aren't groundbreaking claims.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Apple's Game Porting Toolkit 4 is a big improvement for modern game coders
item.description: Apple's fourth-gen Game Porting Toolkit has big speed boosts when testing modern games on a Mac. Here's what's faster, and what it means for users.
item.content:encoded:
Apple's fourth-gen Game Porting Toolkit has big speed boosts when testing modern games on a Mac. Here's what's faster, and what it means for users.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Blink has a big speed advantage against WebKit in browser tests
item.description: WebKit has met its match, as the prototype Blink schools Apple's well-worn browser engine and hints at the future of web browsing on iOS.
item.content:encoded:
WebKit has met its match, as the prototype Blink schools Apple's well-worn browser engine and hints at the future of web browsing on iOS.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: iPhone users can now join the 'Pokemon Champions' fray
item.description: "Pokemon Champions" has arrived on iPhone and iPad, giving players access to a dedicated competitive battle platform and the same matchmaking ecosystem available on Nintendo's consoles.
item.content:encoded:
"Pokemon Champions" has arrived on iPhone and iPad, giving players access to a dedicated competitive battle platform and the same matchmaking ecosystem available on Nintendo's consoles.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Sign in with Apple domain consolidation could trip up unprepared services
item.description: Apple is changing the email domains behind Sign in with Apple and Hide My Email, forcing developers and email providers to update systems before the transition begins.
item.content:encoded:
Apple is changing the email domains behind Sign in with Apple and Hide My Email, forcing developers and email providers to update systems before the transition begins.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: AirPods Pro 3 hit lowest price ever at $169 ahead of Amazon Prime Day
item.description: Amazon has issued a steep price drop on AirPods Pro 3 as Prime Day kicks off next week, with the earbuds falling to the lowest price ever at $169.
item.content:encoded:
Amazon has issued a steep price drop on AirPods Pro 3 as Prime Day kicks off next week, with the earbuds falling to the lowest price ever at $169.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Apple's App Store search data stores every single keystroke
item.description: Apple is watching you type App Store searches, and knows how long you take to type them. You can't turn it off.
item.content:encoded:
Apple is watching you type App Store searches, and knows how long you take to type them. You can't turn it off.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Home automation setup will be even easier thanks to Matter 1.6
item.description: With the 1.6 release, the Matter smart home standard is becoming more capable with streamlined setup, improved multi-ecosystem support, and expanded user preferences.
item.content:encoded:
With the 1.6 release, the Matter smart home standard is becoming more capable with streamlined setup, improved multi-ecosystem support, and expanded user preferences.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Apple's Silicon Valley real estate assets gain a $162M office building
item.description: Apple has, once more, increased its office space in Silicon Valley, doling out $162 million for a building in Sunnyvale at a sizable discount.
item.content:encoded:
Apple has, once more, increased its office space in Silicon Valley, doling out $162 million for a building in Sunnyvale at a sizable discount.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Apps can help teach piano, but they're not enough
item.content:encoded: Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: iPhone part factory in India no longer in danger of shutting down
item.description: After alleging that Apple supplier Tata contaminated farm water and threatening to close its iPhone factory, Indian regulators have now dropped the matter altogether.
item.content:encoded:
After alleging that Apple supplier Tata contaminated farm water and threatening to close its iPhone factory, Indian regulators have now dropped the matter altogether.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Snap built standalone AR glasses without a convincing reason to wear them
item.description: Snap Inc. wants its Specs to be the future of everyday computing, but between the eye-watering price and lackluster demos, we don't see it happening.
item.content:encoded:
Snap Inc. wants its Specs to be the future of everyday computing, but between the eye-watering price and lackluster demos, we don't see it happening.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: AirPods Pro & Beats Studio Buds move to new firmware versions
item.description: Apple has released new firmware updates for AirPods and Beats earbuds, continuing its steady rollout of bug fixes and performance improvements across its audio lineup.
item.content:encoded:
Apple has released new firmware updates for AirPods and Beats earbuds, continuing its steady rollout of bug fixes and performance improvements across its audio lineup.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: iPhone's 20th anniversary could be marked with an iPhone Fold 2, plus AirPods with cameras
item.description: A new report claims that Apple is preparing multiple new releases for late 2027, including a 20th-anniversary iPhone, and AirPods with cameras. Though, there's enough hedging here to be skeptical.
item.content:encoded:
A new report claims that Apple is preparing multiple new releases for late 2027, including a 20th-anniversary iPhone, and AirPods with cameras. Though, there's enough hedging here to be skeptical.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Adobe's glowing AI survey leaves out most of the creative industry
item.description: Adobe claims that 75% of creatives now say creative AI is essential to their work, which might be true if you're willing to severely restrict what your definition of a creator is.
item.content:encoded:
Adobe claims that 75% of creatives now say creative AI is essential to their work, which might be true if you're willing to severely restrict what your definition of a creator is.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: 'Widow's Bay' playlist lasts nearly 10 times longer than the show
item.description: Apple Music's new "Widow's Bay" playlist lasts so long that it can outlive the entire first season several times over.
item.content:encoded:
Apple Music's new "Widow's Bay" playlist lasts so long that it can outlive the entire first season several times over.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Amazon slashes M5 MacBook Air with 24GB RAM, 1TB SSD to $1,329
item.description: Amazon has quietly issued steeper M5 MacBook Air price drops on high-end configurations with 24GB of RAM and 1TB of storage thanks to an early Prime Day coupon.
item.content:encoded:
Amazon has quietly issued steeper M5 MacBook Air price drops on high-end configurations with 24GB of RAM and 1TB of storage thanks to an early Prime Day coupon.

item.title: Italy targets iCloud interoperability for DMA investigation
item.description: Apple's troubles with the EU's Digital Markets Act are continuing, with Italy now investigating iCloud and the cloud storage market.
item.content:encoded:
Apple's troubles with the EU's Digital Markets Act are continuing, with Italy now investigating iCloud and the cloud storage market.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: iPhone 18 will get 12GB to fully benefit from Siri AI
item.description: The iPhone 18 is again speculated to get an upgrade to 12GB of memory, so that future owners can get as much of a benefit as possible from Siri AI.
item.content:encoded:
The iPhone 18 is again speculated to get an upgrade to 12GB of memory, so that future owners can get as much of a benefit as possible from Siri AI.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Strident leaker insists iPhone Fold is not delayed at all
item.description: The back and forth of conflicting claims about the iPhone Fold continues, as now a vocal leaker has repeatedly scorned reports of the device being delayed until 2027.
item.content:encoded:
The back and forth of conflicting claims about the iPhone Fold continues, as now a vocal leaker has repeatedly scorned reports of the device being delayed until 2027.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: How to run Minecraft: Bedrock Edition on a Mac
item.description: Playing Minecraft is better with Bedrock, but it's not directly available for macOS. Here's how to get around the limitation and improve your building experience.
item.content:encoded:
Playing Minecraft is better with Bedrock, but it's not directly available for macOS. Here's how to get around the limitation and improve your building experience.

item.title: Game development diary: Running on Steam
item.description: I slipped under the wire and got a demo of "Character Limit" submitted to Steam just in time. Now for the stressful part: It's live in Steam Next Fest.
item.content:encoded:
I slipped under the wire and got a demo of "Character Limit" submitted to Steam just in time. Now for the stressful part: It's live in Steam Next Fest.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: At WWDC 2026, energy and optimism were high as Apple finally delivers
item.description: After spending several days at Apple's campus for WWDC, developers seem to feel energized by everything Apple has announced. Here's my early impression of what Apple has coming.
item.content:encoded:
After spending several days at Apple's campus for WWDC, developers seem to feel energized by everything Apple has announced. Here's my early impression of what Apple has coming.

item.title: Second developer betas for iOS 26.6, macOS 26.6 have arrived
item.description: Apple's beta testing routine for the current-gen operating systems continues, with the second developer builds of iOS 26.6, iPadOS 26.6, watchOS 26.6, tvOS 26.6, visionOS 26.6, and macOS Tahoe 26.6 out now.
item.content:encoded:
Apple's beta testing routine for the current-gen operating systems continues, with the second developer builds of iOS 26.6, iPadOS 26.6, watchOS 26.6, tvOS 26.6, visionOS 26.6, and macOS Tahoe 26.6 out now.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Adobe crams more AI into Lightroom, Premiere, Photoshop, After Effects
item.description: Adobe has added new features to most of its Creative Cloud software, including quite a few that are powered by artificial intelligence.
item.content:encoded:
Adobe has added new features to most of its Creative Cloud software, including quite a few that are powered by artificial intelligence.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Apple Watch Ultra 3 drops to $699.99 as countdown to Prime Day begins
item.description: With only a week to go before Prime Day 2026 kicks off, early Prime Day Apple deals are hitting a fever pitch. Today, we're following a $100 price drop on the Apple Watch Ultra 3, delivering the lowest price of the year.
item.content:encoded:
With only a week to go before Prime Day 2026 kicks off, early Prime Day Apple deals are hitting a fever pitch. Today, we're following a $100 price drop on the Apple Watch Ultra 3, delivering the lowest price of the year.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: India threatens to shut down iPhone factory for polluting farmland
item.description: Apple iPhone manufacturer Tata is accused of contaminating water needed by farms near its plant in Tamil Nadu, India, and of failing to take corrective action after warnings.
item.content:encoded:
Apple iPhone manufacturer Tata is accused of contaminating water needed by farms near its plant in Tamil Nadu, India, and of failing to take corrective action after warnings.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro buyers should watch out for a repeat problem
item.description: The fiasco of the color-changing iPhone 17 Pro is threatening the iPhone 18 Pro, with one leaker claiming that Apple has apparently not managed to defeat truths about chemistry, physics, and user behavior for the fall release.
item.content:encoded:
The fiasco of the color-changing iPhone 17 Pro is threatening the iPhone 18 Pro, with one leaker claiming that Apple has apparently not managed to defeat truths about chemistry, physics, and user behavior for the fall release.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.content:encoded: Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Beats continues World Cup tease of its mystery headphones
item.description: Apple's Beats by Dre is really pushing its unannounced headphones at the World Cup, with more player social media shots suggesting that the new model might be customizable.
item.content:encoded:
Apple's Beats by Dre is really pushing its unannounced headphones at the World Cup, with more player social media shots suggesting that the new model might be customizable.

item.title: Here we go again: Supply chain thinks iPhone Fold will ship in 2027, not 2026
item.description: The iPhone Fold has been on and off for years, but now the supply chain is suggesting that Apple will announce it as expected in September 2026, yet not actually ship it for several months.
item.content:encoded:
The iPhone Fold has been on and off for years, but now the supply chain is suggesting that Apple will announce it as expected in September 2026, yet not actually ship it for several months.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Blowout savings drive MacBook Air prices down to as low as $899
item.description: Two exclusive MacBook Air deals are in effect on M4 13-inch and 15-inch models, dropping prices to as low as $899 while supplies last.
item.content:encoded:
Two exclusive MacBook Air deals are in effect on M4 13-inch and 15-inch models, dropping prices to as low as $899 while supplies last.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Sunday Reboot: The WWDC hangover and Siri AI blindspots
item.description: Apple's WWDC went about as expected for 2026. While it's a tiny bit disappointing, Siri AI turned out to be worth the wait, but with some painful app-based gaps.
item.content:encoded:
Apple's WWDC went about as expected for 2026. While it's a tiny bit disappointing, Siri AI turned out to be worth the wait, but with some painful app-based gaps.

item.title: iPhone Fold, touchscreen MacBook evidence mounts in iOS 27, macOS 27
item.description: As is often the case, Apple has leaked its own hardware. Here are the signs that the folding iPhone and MacBook Pro with touchscreen are coming, and where they are.
item.content:encoded:
As is often the case, Apple has leaked its own hardware. Here are the signs that the folding iPhone and MacBook Pro with touchscreen are coming, and where they are.

item.title: Siri AI success could embolden Apple to charge a subscription
item.description: It's obviously speculation, and repeated at that, but a new report argues that it's more likely that Apple will eventually charge a fee for Siri Ai now that Apple Intelligence has improved so much.
item.content:encoded:
It's obviously speculation, and repeated at that, but a new report argues that it's more likely that Apple will eventually charge a fee for Siri Ai now that Apple Intelligence has improved so much.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Crime blotter: Arrested NFL star accused of biting iPhone
item.description: An employee disappearing with a MacBook, a man convicted of tracking a woman with an AirTag, and a woman who used an AirTag to track her husband in ICE custody, all in this week's Apple Crime Blotter.
item.content:encoded:
An employee disappearing with a MacBook, a man convicted of tracking a woman with an AirTag, and a woman who used an AirTag to track her husband in ICE custody, all in this week's Apple Crime Blotter.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Waymo has bought the Apple Car self-driving test site for $220M
item.description: Over two years after the Apple Car program was declared dead, Apple has offloaded its 5,500-acre Arizona proving ground to Waymo. It's a sale that recoups $220M from the $10B Apple spent on the failed project.
item.content:encoded:
Over two years after the Apple Car program was declared dead, Apple has offloaded its 5,500-acre Arizona proving ground to Waymo. It's a sale that recoups $220M from the $10B Apple spent on the failed project.

Read the original post on AppleInsider

item.title: Apple's M4 Mac mini is back in stock & on sale for $769, but supply is limited
item.description: Priced at a 90-day low, you'll want to grab Amazon's early Prime Day Mac mini deal before inventory runs out.
item.content:encoded:
Priced at a 90-day low, you'll want to grab Amazon's early Prime Day Mac mini deal before inventory runs out.

Read the original post on AppleInsider
